title: Tick Control in Maplewood, NJ | $125 – $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Maplewood, NJ starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Maplewood's tree-lined streets, abundant parks, and proximity to the South Mountain Reservation create the perfect environment for ticks to thrive. Our professional tick control services protect Maplewood families and pets from dangerous tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease with targeted treatments for residential and commercial properties. With pricing from $125 to $325, we offer comprehensive tick management solutions tailored to your property's specific needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings years of experience serving Maplewood and surrounding communities with eco-friendly tick control solutions that are safe for children and pets. Our certified technicians understand the unique challenges of New Jersey's tick populations and provide year-round protection with proven barrier treatments and ongoing monitoring.
localContext: From the wooded areas surrounding Memorial Park to the residential neighborhoods near Maplewood Village, tick activity is a year-round concern for homeowners. Properties near the Reservation, along Valley Street, and throughout the tree-canopied neighborhoods require specialized tick prevention to keep yards and outdoor spaces safe for families to enjoy.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Maplewood, NJ?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Maplewood typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, mild winters can result in year-round tick presence, especially near the South Mountain Reservation and wooded areas. We recommend beginning preventive treatments in early spring and maintaining protection through fall.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Maplewood?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Maplewood range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. Most residential properties fall within the $175-$250 range for initial treatment. We offer seasonal packages and ongoing maintenance plans that provide better value and continuous protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our treatments focus on barrier sprays around your property's perimeter, wooded edges, and high-risk areas. We recommend keeping pets and children inside during application and for 2-3 hours after treatment until the product dries completely.

faqs.question: How often should I treat my Maplewood property for ticks?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend treating your Maplewood property every 4-6 weeks during peak tick season (April through October). Properties adjacent to wooded areas like the South Mountain Reservation may benefit from monthly treatments. We'll assess your specific situation and create a customized treatment schedule based on your property's risk factors and tick activity levels.
